title: HTTP Handler Functions
instruction: Complete helloHandler to write Hello, Go! to the response using fmt.Fprint.

title: Parsing URLs
instruction: Parse the URL in raw using url.Parse. Print scheme, host, path, and q query param.

title: Reading Query Parameters
instruction: In greetHandler, if name is empty set to World. Write Hello, {name}! to w.

title: HTTP Status Codes
instruction: In resourceHandler, return 404 when id==missing else 200. Write not found or found: id.
hint: if id == "missing" { w.WriteHeader(404); fmt.Fprint(w, "not found") } else { w.WriteHeader(200); fmt.Fprint(w, "found: "+id) }

title: Building Query Strings
instruction: Use url.Values: set q=hello world, page=1, add tag=go and tag=web. Print Encode().
